nasb.text: The leaders offered the dedication offering for the altar when it was anointed, so the leaders offered their offering before the altar.

esv.text: And the chiefs offered offerings for the dedication of the altar on the day it was anointed; and the chiefs offered their offering before the altar.

cnv.text: 用膏抹祭壇的日子，眾領袖都獻上奉獻祭壇的禮物；眾領袖把自己的供物獻在祭壇前。

ccb.text: 膏抹祭坛时，各首领都为献坛之礼带来供物，放在祭坛前。
